title: World of Warcraft Weapons
description: Adds World of Warcraft Weapons into Minecraft
body:
<center>

![](https://i.imgur.com/Eu7GU2E.png)

# Adds World of Warcraft Weapons into Minecraft

## How to Find Them:

You can now find all the weapons randomly in loot chests found in mines, strongholds, desert pyramids, jungle temples, underwater ruins and village blacksmiths. If you have Mine and Slash installed, they will be dropped in the loot system.

</center>
